summary: "Configuration for Anonymous access control in Global permission section "
description: """h3. *Problem*    Currently if you want to make your site visible publicly, you must enable anonymous access at site level.   # In the Global permission page in the *Anonymous Access* section, select the *Can use* checkbox.      And Space administrators can grant editing permissions to anonymous users permissions on a space by space basis to make spaces public.     Having said that there is no configuration available, which can suppress space edit permission for the anonymous users globally(for all the spaces at once).    The configuration which can be set by Confluence administrator in global permission to make site read only for anonymous users (they should not allowed to edit page or comment even space administrator assigned permission)  h3. *Suggested Solution*    The configuration which can be set by Confluence administrator in global permission section to make site read only for anonymous users (after setting up the configuration, anonymous users should not be allowed to edit page or comment in any space even space administrator has assigned permission)  h3. *Why This Is Important*    _When there are more spaces in the site it is difficult to manage._    _So if Confluence administrator wants ready only access for anonymous users they have to manage at space permission level ._   h3. *Workaround*    _Manage permission at the space level permission section._ """

Suggestion  Provide the functionality to collapse certain fields as opted by the user when adding the macro. This will result in the data to be hidden and users have to expand the information before it'll be displayed."""

summary: "Batch Drag-and-drop of files cause the Publish Action to fail"
description: """h3. Problem  When creating a new page and adding multiple attachments (the format or size doesn't seem to matter) via Drag-and-Drop at once, the Initial Page title will get removed and the next attempts to publish will fail    h3. Environment  Behavior reproduced with Confluence version *7.7.3* out-of-the-box installation and using:  * Chrome Version 85.0.4183.102 (Official Build) (64-bit)   * Firefox Version 80.0.1 (64-bit)    h3. Steps to Reproduce  * Create a new page  * Add a Page Title  * Drag-and-Drop 3 or multiple files on the page (in my testing 3 txt files containing one character each)  * Attempt to Publish the page    h3. Expected Results  The Page should be published without issue.    h3. Actual Results  The Page Title gets removed and the following attempt(s) to Publish the page will fail.    h3. Workaround  * Drag-and-drop files one at a time and not in batch  * Reloading the page in the browser and adding the title back will get the publish action to work    h3. Notes  A recording illustrating the issue is attached  """

summary: "Word Export of historical page versions"
description: """h3. Summary    Confluence does not have an option to export page from history as Word  h3. Steps to reproduce    Tested on Confluence 7.3.5    1) Created new page   2) Edit content   3) Opened Info->View page history and clicked on first version of document   4) There is no option to 'Export to Word'  h3. Workaround    There are some potential workarounds.   * Pasting the PageID of the old page version into the URL """"https://example.com/exportword?pageId=<>"""" works like a charm. So all that needs to be done is to include this button in the """"three dots menu (...)"""" when viewing old page versions.   * The simplest is to restore to the previous version you want to export, perform the export, and then restore back to the current version.   * If you would like a record of all the previous versions you have printed, or you do not want to alter your version history which restores just for printing you could also copy the previous version to a new space when viewing them:  {quote} # Create a new space - eg; Old Versions   # View the page to export - published version   # View page history   # Click on a previous version to view it   # Now copy to the new space   # Export to word from the new space{quote}    You can delete these restores if you do not want it cluttering your history."""

summary: "'Could not get unique fields for table' errors constantly printed on the logs after installation"
description: """h3. Problem  *Could not get unique fields for table* and *java.sql.SQLException: Invalid argument(s) in call* errors after installation. Some UI functions might also not be working properly, like the workbox notifications or other menus.    h3. Environment    # Oracle Database    h3. Steps to Reproduce    # Follow the documentation to configure Oracle  #* https://confluence.<USER>doc/database-setup-for-oracle-173821.html  # While running it, Create a user with a dot on the name (example: conf.admin)  # Install Confluence and connect to this database    h3. Expected Results    No errors are seen and the instance works as expected.    h3. Actual Results    Some UI functionalities fail and this is seen repeateadly on the *atlassian-confluence.log* file:      h3. Workaround    Since Oracle does not allow renaming the schema, you need to drop it and create a new one without dots. Following the initial example, conf_admin should work fine. On the Confluence side, restart the application setup so it can create the tables on the new schema:    # Stop Confluence  # Remove *<Confluence-home>/confluence.cfg.xml*  # Restart Confluence  # You should be prompted to complete the setup again    h3. Notes    This has previously been reported as a suggestion, but opening it as a bug since Oracle itself allows schema names with dots based on the documentation:    * https://jira.<USER>browse/CONFSERVER-33680  * https://docs.oracle.com/cd/B19306_01/server.102/b14200/sql_elements008.htm"""

summary: "Optimise permissions checking for a space"
description: """h1. Background    At the moment, if a space has permissions for 10 different groups, and Confluence needs to check is user has an access to the space, it call this method 10 times:    If there are a plenty of groups, each call would take some time, and users will notice the slowness of the system.  h1. Possible solutions  h2. Solution 1. We need a method in Crowd like:    It would improve performance, but it requires to change Crowd API.   h2. Solution 2. Retrieve all user groups only once    Another way (without modifying Crowd) is to retrieve all user’s groups first (Crowd allows to do this). And then check check user's groups against space groups without calling Crowd again.    The only problem could be if a user is a part of thousands of groups, but, fortunately, the result will be cached and used for any other space.    Here is the relevant stack-trace:  """

summary: "Ability to have the Websudo functionality working with SAML / SSO"
description: """h4. Problem Definition    When using JIT provisioning in Confluence Data Center, you can't access Confluence Administration because the websudo form gives a *wrong credentials* error.  h4. Suggested Solution    I am requesting an enhancement to allow websudo to work with SAML setup as well as to allow websudo to work with other marketplace SAML plugins.  h4. Workaround    There are two possible workarounds to access Confluence Administration:   * *Disable the secure sessions*, removing the websudo form. As a side-effect, you can go straight into administration functions without confirmation that you should. This poses a security risk.   * *Set a new password for the user that was created with JIT provisioning*: JIT provisioning creates a user in Confluence Internal Directory and you can define a password for this user. As a side-effect, an administrator will have 2 passwords - the IdP password to log in Confluence and the Internal password to authenticate in secure-sessions.    h4.  """

summary: """Codeblock"" Macro does not copy leading blanks with copy/paste "

Example:   !image-1.png|width=359,height=143!!image-2.png|width=358,height=193!  h3. Suggested Solution    Implement things like  h3. summary: "Run XML export in sandbox process "
description: """h3. Problem Definition  XML export of space or site consumes a lot of computing resources and can affect the performance of other operation in Confluence.   e.g. Someone runs XML export of a huge space and it causes garbage collection ending up with an overall performance degradation.     h3.  Suggested Solution  Let the XML export run in the [External Process Pool for Confluence Data Center|https://confluence.<USER>doc/external-process-pool-for-confluence-data-center-958779098.html]"""

summary: "As a Confluence user I'd like to have a popup message for export control considerations before every attachment/file upload"
description: """h3. Problem Definition      As a Confluence user, I want to be able to have a popup message displayed when a new file is uploaded for export control considerations, and currently, we don't have that option.    h3. Suggested Solution    The Popup box should display """"Have you checked with the content owner to ensure the export markings are current and accurate?""""    With """"Yes"""" and """"No"""" options    If the user selects """"Yes"""" the upload is allowed to proceed.  If the user selects """"No"""" the upload is denied    h3. Why this is important    This is important so we can ensure accountability for export markings.    h3. Workaround    n/a  """
comments: "Perhaps this could be configured to be turned on at the space or the system level.  I.E. at the system level allow it to be enabled for the whole system or allow it to be enabled at the space level. "

summary: "Adding line breaks between two macros in a Confluence page won't be properly rendered as new lines"
description: """h3. Issue Summary  When a macro is inserted in a page, the Confluence editor adds the following HTML tag before the macro code:      Pointing the editor cursor to the line with this code and adding line breaks will create new paragraphs with the same class tag.  When the page is published, these paragraphs are not rendered as expected in page view mode, since they are not treated as new lines.    h3. Steps to Reproduce  # Install a vanilla instance of Confluence.   #* This was validated on Confluence 7.4.3 and 7.7.2.   #* The issue did *not* exist on Confluence *6.6.3* nor on *6.13.4*.   #* The issue does not occur if Collaborative Editing is disabled on the affected versions.  # Create a new Space.  # Create a sample page.  # In the first line of the page add an Info Macro.  # Use the _up arrow_ keyboard button to go the previous line and add another Info Macro.  # Use the _down arrow_ keyboard button to go the next line, which will be between both macros.  # Use the _return (enter)_ keyboard button to add new lines between the two macros.   !screenshot-1.png|thumbnail!   # Publish the page.    h3. Expected Results  When the page is displayed, the new lines created between the two Info Macros are properly rendered as blank space.     h3. Actual Results  There's no new line between the two macros.  If you check the storage format it will be as below:    \\  \\   !screenshot-2.png|thumbnail!     h3. Workaround  When editing the page, select all lines between the macros and use the CMD+0 (CTRL+0) [keyboard shortcut|https://confluence.<USER>doc/keyboard-shortcuts-139456.html] to change them to the regular paragraph formatting.  """

summary: "Confluence 7.8 EAP Feedback"
description: """Atlassian says they have an """"eap"""" label for the latest EAP release in dockerhub:  [https://hub.docker.com/r/atlassian/confluence-server/ 5|https://hub.docker.com/r/atlassian/confluence-server/]  _""""For the latest developer (EAP) release use {{atlassian/confluence-server:eap}} . This will install our latest milestone (not supported for use in production).""""_    It's not true. There is no such tag in Confluence's docker hub. We need it.    There is a """"latest"""" image and we use that for the latest published version but we need an """"eap"""" label so we don't have to dig through the various """"76-eap-1"""", """"76-eap-2"""", ... labels to find the latest EAP image.    Every time there is an EAP release we have to: 1) notice it, 2) go find out where the image is    To add to that, there is no 7.8 label with """"eap"""" in it.  It looks like 7.6 is the last time Atlassian used eap in a docker image label. The docker hub image label naming is inconsistent.         Here is the community thread about this:    [https://community.developer.<USER>t/confluence-docker-images-we-need-a-generic-eap-tag/40502]     """
comments: "Here is the page announcing the EAP release for 7.8:    [https://confluence.<USER>doc/preparing-for-confluence-7-8-1021219655.html]    Right now it says the latest milestone is 7.8.0-m37 so I have updated my docker-compose.yml:              and the announcement says... *""...Watch this page to find out when a new milestone is available and what’s changed....""* (probably not going to happen... I'm busy)    So in order for me to stay on top of the EAP release I'm going to have to watch that page and when 7.8.0-m37 changes to something else, edit my docker-compose.yml file for my test server.    A more efficient (safer) approach would be for Atlassian to use an eap label like we use the 'latest' label so we can:                   And then we would periodically restart our docker containers and we would automatically be up to date.      " [SEP] "There are similar issues with the EAP JSON feed itself.  https://community.developer.<USER>t/using-the-eap-feeds-to-automatically-test-my-app/34731" [SEP] "T

summary: "Prevent recursive macro execution"
description: """h3. Problem Definition  Some Confluence macros could call other macros which would lead to recursive calls. Such operations are resource-extensive and could caused performance issue in Confluence.    h3. Suggested Solution  For Confluence to limit the macro's recursion depth, in order to avoid high resource utilisation and {{StackOverflowError}} in specific.    h3. Workaround   Once identified, disable the culprit apps/plugins temporarily."""

summary: "Prevent TC from overriding jquery UI global widgets"
description: """h3. Issue Summary    Currently TC overrides JQuery UI Widgets with the JQUERY UI Widgets it needs, we need to move/rename them     The widgets being overridden are:   * ui.menu   * ui.resizable    h3. Steps to Reproduce   # None    h3. Expected Results    TC shouldn't override global jquery UI widgets  h3. Actual Results    TC overrides global jquery UI widgets  h3. Workaround    vendors can move the widgets they use to their namespaces but it will result in duplications """
comments: "We faced an issue where Team Calendar resources overriding of the JQuery UI menu widget caused some of our macros to not work properly. It should be noted that even though the autocomplete widget is not overridden, it will not function as expected as it depends of the menu widget under the hood. Due to racing conditions, TC could either override the default widgets and impact the apps that rely on them or instead be affected by the defaults being reverted by resources of an app being loaded later than TC resources.         If you are facing this issue, as a workaround until this is fixed, consider namespacing the widgets you app is using. Alternatively, if you want to avoid duplication and downloading larger resources for your app users, you can consider the following workaround:   # Check if TC resources have been loaded by running {{AJS.$.fn.autocompleteTC}} immediately before your app uses the JQuery UI widget.   # If the autocompleteTC function exists, save either {{AJS.$.ui.menu}} or {{AJS.$.ui.resiz

summary: "save color of table cell besides content"
description: """User story: In a page property report everything is transported what a cell contains. The report lists the desired property content of a page. Often I am asked how to set background colours in the report table or how to highlight something. We used status macro for that but when we use status macros then the affected row cannot be sorted. The table as an overview helps to prioritize but there is no way to show more than the content - maybe the priority set. The native move would be to set a background color like in MS Excel. This is what we would like to achieve.  Our Request: Make it work that with the page properties also the background-color of the table cell will be shown in the property report.  Effect: the overview can contain more infos than cell values: background-colors can offer more dimensions necessary to compare or display information - which then is a better basis for decisions."""

summary: "As a Confluence administrator I would like to configure cluster members using IP range"
description: """h3. Problem Definition  On Confluence Data Center, when using tcp_ip as the cluster join method, cluster members must be configured in {{confluence.cfg.xml}} within the {{confluence.cluster.peers}} attributes.  The only possible configuration is by adding a comma-separated list of IP addresses as described in [this KB article|https://confluence.<USER>doc/change-node-discovery-from-multicast-to-tcp-ip-or-aws-792297728.html].    Confluence Data Center makes use of Hazelcast to administer the cluster.  The Hazelcast framework accepts member list configuration by IP range as described [in their documentation|https://docs.hazelcast.org/docs/3.11/manual/html-single/#discovering-members-by-tcp]:  {quote}  (...)    As shown above, you can provide IP addresses or hostnames for {{member}} elements. You can also give a range of IP addresses, such as {{192.168.1.0-7}}.  Instead of providing members line-by-line as shown above, you also have the option to use the {{members}} element and write comma-separated IP addresses, as shown below.  {{<members>192.168.1.0-7,192.168.1.21</members>}}  If you do not provide ports for the members, Hazelcast automatically tries the ports 5701, 5702 and so on.    (...)  {quote}      h3. Suggested Solution  Make it possible to configure Confluence cluster members using IP range as described in the Hazelcast documentation.     h3. Workaround   Use a comma-separated list of IP addresses as described in Confluence documentation.  """

summary: "Unpublished drafts can stop pages from being moved due to already existing page titles"
description: """h3. Problem  When moving a page to another Space, if one of its child pages has the same name as a page in the destination Space, the move operation will fail, as Confluence does not allow two pages with the same name to exist in a single Space, which is the expected behavior. Normally, the child page can then be renamed in order to allow the parent page to be moved.    However, this will also happen if that child page (with a matching name) is an unpublished draft, which causes an issue as:  # The unpublished draft does not show under the page tree, or on searches, which makes it difficult to locate  # Only the person who created this draft has access to it (in order to publish or delete it) - most importantly, not even Confluence admins have access to this draft ([CONFSERVER-35921|https://jira.<USER>browse/CONFSERVER-35921])    h3. Steps to Reproduce  # Create page """"Matching title"""" in """"Dest Space""""  # Create page """"Page to move"""" in """"Source Space""""  # Create page """"Matching title"""" in """"Source Space"""" as child of """"Page to move"""", but don't publish it (wait for Confluence to automatically save the unpublished draft)  # Try to move page """"Page to move"""" to """"Dest Space""""    h3. Expected Results  The page move still shouldn't happen, as expected, since Confluence does not allow pages with duplicated names in the same Space.    However, in cases when the duplicated page is an unpublished draft, Confluence should handle this better, as this issue can't be solved by a regular user or admin (who aren't the owner of the draft).     At least, it could indicate that the duplicated page is indeed a draft, or perhaps provide the option to ignore the conflicting draft when moving the parent page.    h3. Actual Results  Confluence will just throw this error:        h3. Workaround  Deleting the unpublished draft allows the parent page to be moved successfully (however, only the owner of the draft is capable of deleting it).  """
comments: "I originally reported this problem. I wondered if a similar issue would happen if there was a restricted child page that the user moving the parent can't see, but it doesn't. In that case Confluence does not allow the parent page to be moved to a different space (the *New space* field is greyed out in the *Move Page* dialog box). That might be an appropriate way to handle the unpublished draft case as well, although it leaves the user trying to move the page with zero information as to why they can't.    Since these two cases have some similarities (the page that's blocking the move is not visible to the user trying to move the page), it would be nice to handle them consistently, or at least similarly."

summary: "Sanity check of Data post Confluence migration"
description: """Currently we do not have a tool to check the integrity for all the data/attachments/comments <USER>post Confluence migration from one server to other. This request is to have such a tool where there is a way to validate this post Confluence migration. """

summary: "Deleting an attachment version causes all labels to be removed from the page"
description: """h3. Issue Summary    When you delete a version of an attachment attached to a page, any labels added to the page will be automatically removed.    (i) This only happens when an attachment has multiple versions and you remove one of them, leaving at least one version of the attachment still attached to the page.    If you remove an attachment with only 1 version, the bug doesn't occur.  h3. Steps to Reproduce   # Create a new page.   # Add an attachment to the page.   # Add labels to the page and save it.   # Navigate to {{...}} > {{Attachments}} and add a 2nd version of the same attachment.   # Remove any 1 of the 2 attachment versions.   # Go back to the page.    h3. Expected Results    The labels should still be intact on the page.  h3. Actual Results    All labels for that page are missing.  h3. Workaround    Currently there is no known workaround for this behaviour. A workaround will be added here when available.    We suggest sticking with our latest Long Term Support (LTS) Release - Confluence 7.4.4, which is not affected by this bug."""
comments: "This affects our team too, this needs to be fixed, we can't loose all the labels on our site!     " [SEP] "Team,  Our upgrade plan has been blocked by this. Please help to prioritize, data loss is something which we can't accept." [SEP] "A fix for this issue is available to Server and Data Center customers in Confluence 7.8.1  [Upgrade|https://www.<USER>software/confluence/download?utm_source=confluence_bugfix&utm_campaign=confluence_bugfix&utm_medium=email] now or check out the [Release Notes|https://confluence.<USER>doc/issues-resolved-in-7-8-1-1027114676.html?utm_source=confluence_bugfix&utm_campaign=confluence_bugfix&utm_medium=email] to see what other issues are resolved."

summary: "The Companions does not work correctly when the upgrade fails"
description: """h3. Problem    The Companions app does not work properly when the upgrade fails and the user running the app does not have admin permissions or limited access on the system.    The problem seems to be caused due the user limited access on the system, that causes the upgrade to fail and then the app runs in a bad way. *If change the app to not try to update, the app run just fine. It seems the failed update is causing problems on the app to run after.*    The Companion app does run, but these problems happens:   * The companion app screen is always blank with no information   * Click on the icon on the task bar does not open the pop-up with the options   * The files are downloaded correctly, but the Companion app does not show them, only a blank screen   !Screen Shot 2020-09-01 at 15.55.34.png|thumbnail!    * After saving the file, nothing happens (same blank page on the app)   * The logs shows this error on the start-up:      h3. Environment    * Companion app installed with EXE file  * Windows where the user does not have admin privileges/limited access    h3. Steps to Reproduce     # Install the Companion app   # Try to edit a file   # Save the file   # Nothing happens    h3. Expected Results    The Companion apps works and the files are saved back on Confluence.    h3. Actual Results    The Companions apps does not run correctly and do not save files back on Confluence.  h3. Workaround    Open the file:    <DISK>:\Users\<user>\AppData\Local\atlassian-desktop-companion\app-XXXX\resources\companionConfig.<USER>   Change the:    To:    Save the file and restart the Companion app  h3. Notes"""

summary: "We need to be able to add inline comments inside macros. Specifically the Navitabs macros. "
description: """Confluence does not allow for inline comments to be added in macros. It would be very helpful for us to have this functionality supported. """

summary: "Copy and paste into Confluence WYSIWYG editor results in junk HTML characters"
description: """There should an option to save the copied content in a plain text or give the user an option to amend the incoming styles/HTML tags to existing Confluence tags in the editor."""
comments: "Please vote for and watch these related issues:    https://jira.<USER>browse/CONFSERVER-7118    https://jira.<USER>browse/CONFSERVER-4337" [SEP] "Additional notes about this major design flaw/bug:   * Atlassian support tells me that copy-paste from one Confluence page to another also results in junk HTML. This is just bad programming; a  bug. Not a feature request.   * The copy-paste problems occur regardless of where you are copy-pasting from: Notepad, Google docs, anything.     "

summary: "Create button becomes hidden behind search box when Confluence window is resized"
description: """h3. Issue Summary    Create button can be hidden behind search box in top menu bar when the Confluence window is resized.  h3. Environment   * Google Chrome Version 85.0.4183.83 (Official Build) (64-bit)   * Confluence 7.4.3    h3. Steps to Reproduce   # Open the Confluence main dashboard.   # Grab the right-hand edge of the browser window and resize it by making it narrower until the search box covers the Create button    h3. Expected Results    The Create button can be clicked.  h3. Actual Results    The search box takes precedence.  h3. Notes    Apps that add items to the top bar, like Header Menus ([https://marketplace.<USER>apps/1219465/header-menus?hosting=server&tab=overview]), make the problem worse but it can still be reproduced without any third-party apps. See attached screenshot.  h3. Workaround    Resize the browser window until the Create button is no longer under the search box."""
comments: "Hello [~<USER>,    Thanks for opening this ticket. Can you confirm that by doing that we are not going below the minimum display size for Confluence (1024x768)?    [Supported Platforms|https://confluence.<USER>display/DOC/Supported+Platforms]" [SEP] "[~<EMAIL>] – I was only able to reproduce it in a window narrower than 768 pixels. Thanks for pointing that out; I missed it.     "

summary: "REGRESSION - Import Word Document of a docx file doesn't import the image"
description: """h3. Issue Summary    Import Word Document of a .docx file doesn't import the image.  h3. Steps to Reproduce   # Navigate to a *Confluence Page*   # !https://confluence.<USER>doc/files/704577869/704577870/2/1517274795952/ellipsis.png|width=22! > *Import Word Document*  # Select a *.docx file*  # Click on *Next*    h3. Expected Results    The image successfully imported to the Confluence page.  h3. Actual Results    Not all images are imported correctly.  h3. Workaround    Convert the .docx document to .doc format."""

summary: "Add ability to CQL/search to filter based on comment existence"
description: """We use inline comments as a simple form of collaboration/review.    It would be helpful if it was possible to search or pages   * with comments   * with inline comment   * *with unresolved inline comments*    with the last option being the most important in my view."""

summary: "Include macro to show Jira links in the page's contents"
description: """Confluence has a button to show linked Jira issues below the header:         !image-2020-08-31-14-38-55-113.png!         Many of our users aren't aware of this button. It would thus be beneficial to have a macro that shows the same contents in the page's content.         This way, linked Jira items could be display in line with other content, people _will read._"""

summary: "Team Calendars sort behavior is broken"
description: """h3. Issue Summary    Team Calendars attempts to perform a search for subcalendars that a user is entitled to see when attempting to add a calendar using the """"Team Calendars"""" macro in Confluence. By normal behavior, this returns 10 most relevant results. However, if more results are to be generated either through changing search parameters or it uses a common search term, the sorting in the search field results will break.    h3. Steps to Reproduce  # Create a Team calendar (any version of the plugin is fine)  # Create 11 calendars with similar names (see screenshot)  # Go into a page editor, and add the """"Team Calendars macro""""  # Attempt to add the calendars by name, in any order    h3. Expected Results    Calendars will sort alphanumerically (sometimes the numerical sorting is weird due to how ordinals are treated):    !image-2020-08-27-19-11-35-319.png|thumbnail!     h3. Actual Results    Calendars will have random sort results after a content reindex:    !image-2020-08-27-19-15-43-922.png|thumbnail!     Since these results are then added to an existing set, the previous sort order will likely be lost and the order becomes random as a fallback.    h3. Workaround    Currently there is no known workaround for this behavior. A workaround will be added here when available.    - That said, you can just change all your calendars to have fully distinct names and codes so they are more readily searchable. Using generic calendar names could cause you to run into this situation."""

summary: "Inconsistent Location when Transitioning Between Editing  and View Mode"
description: """h3. Summary  Entering and exiting the editor can be very inconsistent. It will not always stay in the same location. This can be very frustrating for large pages.    h3. Steps to replicate  # Add attached storage format to a page:  [^test_storage_format.txt]  # Edit * n Chrome* (using 'e' shortcut) from *Certificate Management* section  # Observe the location on the page of the editor    h3. Expected results  # *Certificate Management* stays at the top of the screen when entering and leaving the editor    h3. Actual results  # Entering the editor you are navigated to roughly a full-screen size above where the Certificate Management heading title should be displayed    h3. Other Information   * Video capture of the issue attached:  [^Screen Recording 2020-08-27 at 1.57.57 PM.mov]   * [Confluence 5.9 Release Notes|https://confluence.<USER>doc/confluence-5-9-release-notes-785333580.html#Confluence5.9ReleaseNotes-Editapage,withoutlosingyourplace] under *Edit a page, without losing your place*  it confirms that Confluence should open and close the editor in the same spot  * Was not reproducible in Firefox on Mac, but was reproducible on Firefox in Ubuntu. Was reproduced in Chrome for Windows, Linux, and Mac."""

summary: "Sidebar border grows with the size of the sidebar padding."
description: """h3. Summary  The sidebar has a border that grows according to the sidebar size. For instance, if you have a page with a long title, as soon as you move the sidebar so you can read the title, the border also grows.     This border also hides the text, so you need to move the sidebar until the border is no longer hiding the text.    h3. Steps to Reproduce  # Create a page with a long title.  # Go moving the sidebar. You will notice a border with the same color of the sidebar(gray).    h3. Expected Results  The border will have a fixed padding/size    h3. Actual Results  The border grows along with the sidebar     h3. Notes  * Screenshots showing the border attached.  * The sidebar also does not have a tooltip showing the title(tracked on https://jira.<USER>browse/CONFSERVER-31930).Sidebar    h3.Workaround  No workaround  """

summary: "Add Data Integrity checks and Improve Confluence XML Backup Experience"
description: """h3. Problem    Customers are reporting issues while trying to import an XML Site Backup back into a Confluence Vanilla instance (same version for instance *LTS 7.4.3* ). This should not happen:   * the end-user experience can be improved by adding upfront checks directly in Confluence XML Backup code.   * the end-user experience is currently impacted by such failure    h3. Suggested Solution    The Confluence site XML backup and restore processes should have a consistent level of data integrity checking so that Confluence administrators and end-users can be confident to restore their Backup successfully. This can be improved by:   -  Either Adding data integrity checking to the backup process so backups fail with a warning about data integrity issues    -  Or Remove data integrity checking in {{user_mapping}} from the restore process - even with duplicate user mappings Confluence ran fine    h3. Why This Is Important    Having a look at these 2 Knowledge-Based articles:   * *[Restore of a site XML backup fails due to duplicate entry '' for key 'unq_lwr_username' error|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/restore-of-a-site-xml-backup-fails-due-to-duplicate-entry-for-key-unq_lwr_username-error-998896818.html]*   * *[Confluence site XML import fails with """"duplicate key"""" error|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/confluence-site-xml-import-fails-with-duplicate-key-error-438993638.html]*  And the number of support tickets that have been resolved thanks to them can give you an idea of how this had (and keep) affect the Confluence end-users experience in recent history.    h3. Workaround   * Follow *[Confluence site XML import fails with """"duplicate key"""" error|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/confluence-site-xml-import-fails-with-duplicate-key-error-438993638.html]* or *[Restore of a site XML backup fails due to duplicate entry '' for key 'unq_lwr_username' error|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/restore-of-a-site-xml-backup-fails-due-to-duplicate-entry-for-key-unq_lwr_username-error-998896818.html]* until complete resolution of errors"""

summary: "Log analyzer will stop to work after application restart"
description: """h3. Issue Summary  On clean installation, after the first restart (after installation) log analyzer will stop working. It will continue to analyze log even past 100%, also it will not show the correct size of Atlassian-confluence.log.    h3. Steps to Reproduce   # Install Confluence 7.7.2 Data Center   # Inspect Log Analyzer. It should work.   # Restart Confluence   # Inspect Log Analyzer    h3. Expected Results  # Log Analyzer would analyze logs and show results.    h3. Actual Results  It will continue to run analysis even past 100% and get stuck.  Size of the Atlassian-confluience.log  will be incorrectly displayed  Downgrading or upgrading Support Tools plugin (1.27.5, 1.27.2, 1.26.0, or 1.25.0) will not change the behavior.  Changing the path to a different log file and running it again will display the same behavior.    h3. Workaround  Currently, there is no known workaround for this behavior. A workaround will be added here when available"""
comments: "This is happening with version 7.4.3 as well.    Please consider adding a rollback steps of a customer upgraded a plugin and faced a bug we can safely rollback.    Plugin version with problem is 1.27.5.    Also priority is high not low, please" [SEP] "I read bug severity.         This would match Major, as we can not check logs from GUI.  h3. {color:#000000}Severity 2 - Major{color}    A feature is unavailable & users job functions are impaired." summary: "Disable People who can view feature for Anonymous users"
description: """This feature request is raised to provide Admins with feature to hide People who can view option for Anonymous users.    Currently the feasible option in to hide this is with CSS and admins do not want to use CSS level changes.    The features that admins should be able to hide/disable are mentioned below.    1) Regarding the option to disable """"People who can view"""" feature   [https://confluence.<USER>conf74/check-who-can-view-a-page-1003129102.html#Checkwhocanviewapage-DisablethePeoplewhocanviewoption]  , disabling the feature should also block the action URL's related to this feature, particularly /plugins/gatekeeper-plugin/who-can-view/evaluate.action. URL."""

Making this configurable for anonymous users is optional feature.    Please consider converting the ticket from Suggestion into a *Bug*."

summary: "Confluence not able to render more than 2 page properties macro in a single page"
description: """h3. Issue Summary    When user try to add more than 2 page properties report macro in a Confluence page, Confluence is only able to render the first 2 page properties report macro and the following macro will render with the following error.    *PS: Tested in Confluence version 7.6. The feature is working fine in version 7.6.*  h3. Steps to Reproduce   # Create a Confluence page   # Add 4 page properties report macro   # Save the page   (i) For details, please refer to the following video   [^Recording #19.mp4]    h3. Expected Results    Expect to see 4 page properties report macro render correctly without any error  h3. Actual Results    Only the first 2 page properties report macro is able to render.   !screenshot-1.png|thumbnail!  h3. Workaround #1    Add the page properties report macro in another page. Then use the include page macro to display the page properties macro from other pages.  h3. Workaround #2    Set the confluence.masterdetails.maximum.recursion.depth [system property|https://confluence.<USER>doc/configuring-system-properties-168002854.html] to a higher number (defaults to 2) (requires a restart of Confluence)"""
comments: "We have the same problem" [SEP] "We have the same problem. In our system we are using a lot these page properties macros and now half of them are broken :(         04-Sep-2020,    We have implemented Workaround #2 and it now works fine again    THANKS !!" [SEP] "A fix for this issue is available to Server and Data Center customers in Confluence 7.7.3  [Upgrade|https://www.<USER>software/confluence/download?utm_source=confluence_bugfix&utm_campaign=confluence_bugfix&utm_medium=email] now or check out the [Release Notes|https://confluence.<USER>doc/confluence-7-7-release-notes-994312218.html?utm_source=confluence_bugfix&utm_campaign=confluence_bugfix&utm_medium=email] to see what other issues are resolved."

summary: "Macro label on sections in page edit view, pls also add label to the bottom left, to differentiate multiple macro boxes"
description: """When editing a page, if you are using are a lot of macros, for example,   * Formatting macros (i.e., Section, Panel, Column, Column, Expand,...)   * Other macros (i.e., Multiexcerpt, Excerpt, Note, Info,...)    and you scroll further down on the page such that you can no longer see the macros label on the top left of the light gray boxes/sections denoting the specific macro, it becomes very difficult to tell which macro border is which.  You often don't realize that you've moved a group of text into the wrong box until you've saved a page, or visit another page (in the case of Excerpt).    For edit view, it would be ideal to differentiate the macro boxes somehow.  Some options include:   # Currently the macro boxes are only labeled at the top left corner.  Please also include the same macro label, such as """"Panel"""" or """"Expand"""" or """"Section"""" also at the bottom left of the macro box/section.   # Another approach, which might be more difficult, would be to color the macro boxes (or use different formatting like dotted line).         Thank you. """

summary: "Share this page feature, email subject heading to also include Space name"
description: """I host several Spaces for different teams with specific permissions.  Some of these commercial teams use their Spaces more than others (can recall their Space name, but not the Confluence platform name).    The current Share feature only includes the specific Page name in the generated email subject heading.  It would greatly help the infrequent users to also have the Space name in the email subject as well (consistently reminds them of their dedicated Space name).  These users may not remember that the Space is generated using Confluence.    This would also facilitate my tracking of how many Shares I send out per Space (currently I have to remember which pages are from specific Spaces, if I want to track my frequency via email).  Thank you.         Example, Training (page), The Stacks (space):    Current email subject *""""[confluence] Chi,Candace shared """"Training"""" with you""""* - you cannot tell which Space this is from    Suggested change options:   # *""""[confluence] Chi, Candace shared """"Training"""" from {color:#00875a}""""The Stacks""""{color} with you""""*   # *""""[confluence] Chi, Candace shared """"{color:#00875a}The Stacks:{color} Training"""" with you""""***   # (less ideal), Keep the current email subject with the Space name auto generated at the top of the text in the email message """

summary: "Support AJP with Synchrony"
description: """h3. Issue Summary  Currently, Confluence only supports AJP connectors if you don't use collaborative editing, but it would be good if we could have the option to use both of them together.      h3. Workaround  Have an HTTP connector for synchrony traffic on the server.xml file."""
comments: "We use AJP and reverse proxy on Linux server with Windows Web Server IIS. We can't use Synchrony feature: collaborative editing. Please help to provide a solution to this bug. Thanks."

summary: "Option to synchronise a selected groups and membership from LDAP periodically for  Delegated LDAP Authentication directory"
description: """Add additional option for the *Delegated LDAP Authentication* directory to synchronise a selected groups (including their membership) from LDAP periodically."""

summary: "Code Macro Throwing ""Can't Find Brush For <language> Error"""
description: """h3. Issue Summary  We are experiencing an issue between the Code Macro block and one of our custom addons after upgrading to Confluence 7.4.1. It seems to only happen when both of the macros are on one page, even when not nested and when they shouldnt be relating to each other.    h3. Steps to Reproduce  1. It happens on new pages as well as old. I created a new page and dropped in a super simple code block with no issues, but as soon as I added our custom Macro, the issue started popping up intermittently.  2. The only setting that seems important here is the Syntax Highlighting, and the error will happen when its set to one of our custom languages. The rest of the options can be blank, as seen in the screenshot.  3. At the moment I see it happening in Chrome and IE, though I dont have Firefox/Edge/Safari to test with.  4. Create a new page. Add in a Code Block using the custom language. Anywhere else on the page, add in the custom macro. This should make the error intermittently appear.    h3. Expected Results  Both of these macros should be able to exist on a page without the browser throwing """"SyntaxHighlighter Cant find brush for:"""" errors    h3. Actual Results    The below exception is thrown in the xxxxxxx.log file:  These errors show up when both macros are on the page.    h3. Workaround   Currently there is no known workaround for this behavior. A workaround will be added here when available"""
comments: "Pulling in a comment from our support ticket with more details:    We did a bit more debugging this week and have narrowed it down to not being an issue with our custom Single Source macro directly.    One of our devs created a page that does not use our custom Single Source macro, and was still able to reproduce the error. His comment:  The error means that the main core code for the Code Macro has not loaded in time for this custom script to use it. The SyntaxHighlighter object doesn't exist yet (""not defined"").    So, it appears to be a ""race condition"" or ordering issue. Refreshing with CTRL-F5 causes it to by chance load the right Javascript file where the SyntaxHighlighter is defined before the script for our custom language and then it works.    Console error in browser:    Here is the storage format from a page we received the error on:         Since we are seeing this with other macros not our own, it seems like a different issue than I initially was suggesting. " [SEP] "  We found this on ano

summary: "Status Macro colors are formatted correctly in edit mode after upgrading Confluence from 7.1.1 to 7.6.2"
description: """h3. Issue Summary    Status is invisible in edit mode when using [Status Macro|https://confluence.<USER>doc/status-macro-223222355.html]   h3. Steps to Reproduce   # Install Confluence 7.1.1   # Create a page that includes Status Macro.   # Upgrading Confluence from 7.1.1 to 7.6.2 and restore the content   # On viewing the restored page in 7.6.2 in edit mode, the status is invisible.    I noticed the issue is not seen on the newly added Status Macro to the restored page.   h3. Expected Results    Status colors to be displayed correctly in view mode.  h3. !image-2020-08-24-16-56-03-815.png|width=425,height=184!      !Status.png|width=733,height=464!       h3. Actual Results    Status colors are not displayed/formated correctly in view mode.   h3. !image-2020-08-24-16-56-19-678.png|width=414,height=283!      !Status2.png|width=685,height=395!       h3. Workaround    Temporary Workaround   # Navigate to *General Configuration* > *Stylesheet*   # Add the following snippet there - the color codes are taken from [Lozenges - AUI Documentation|https://docs.<USER>aui/8.5.1/docs/lozenges.html]  {code:css}  .status-macro.aui-lozenge {      background-color: #DFE1E6;      border-color: #DFE1E6;      color: #42526E;  }    .status-macro.aui-lozenge.aui-lozenge-error {      background-color: #BF2600;      border-color: #BF2600;      color: #FFFFFF;    }    .status-macro.aui-lozenge.aui-lozenge-success {          background-color: #00875A;      border-color: #00875A;      color: #FFFFFF;  }    .status-macro.aui-lozenge.aui-lozenge-removed {          background-color: #BF2600;      border-color: #BF2600;      color: #FFFFFF;  }    .status-macro.aui-lozenge.aui-lozenge-current {          background-color: #0052CC;      border-color: #0052CC;      color: #FFFFFF;  }    .status-macro.aui-lozenge.aui-lozenge-moved {      background-color: #FFF0B3;      border-color: #FFF0B3;      color: #172B4D;  }  {code}     # Save the config"""

summary: "Add a zoom feature to the PDF macro"
description: """In the PDF macro there is a button for Fullscreen mode, but it only allows one level of zoom. It would be good to multiple levels of zoom available so it would be easier to view complex PDFs. While the Files and Images macro previewer allows for multiple levels of zoom, it doesn't allow for viewing the PDF embedded in the wiki page; you have to click through to the previewer. That's why we would like the zoom feature added to the PDF macro as well."""

summary: "Suggest a REST API method to get results for clustering monitoring. "
description: """h3. Problem Definition    Currently, the Confluence admin cannot monitor the nodes in the Datacenter cluster using the REST API.  h3. Suggested Solution    Create REST API call methods: [Confluence REST API Documentation|https://docs.<USER>atlassian-confluence/REST/6.6.0/]   * Status of the Confluence cluster instead of checking every node associated with the cluster as we have in Bitbucket.   * Automatically send notifications on node count info availability when the node gets disconnected from a cluster (Confluence Cluster View) AND/OR   ** https://<base-url>/plugins/servlet/cluster-monitoring   * Automatically send notifications based on the unavailability of the node in a cluster (Confluence Cluster View)   ** http://<node-url>/status"""

summary: "Not able to apply background colors to row in table using Edge and IE"
description: """h3. Issue Summary    Not able to apply background colors to the row in a table using Edge and IE.    For the Edge browser, the row selection is not possible. For the IE browser, it is possible to select the row, but while applying the background colors, it only applies to the last cell of the row.  h3. Environment   * IE 11   * EDGE 44    Steps to Reproduce   # Create a page   # Insert a table.   # Select any row except the header row.   # Choose the background color to fill in the row.    h3. Expected Results    The background applies to the row.  h3. Actual Results    For the IE browser, the background color is only applied to the last cell of the row.    For the Edge browser, it is not possible to select the rows.  h3. Workaround    Use the Chrome browser."""
comments: "This is a duplicate of CONFSERVER-59551"

summary: "Redirect user to search page/search result page after login when search is performed during the user session timout"
description: """h3. Summary  Currently, if the user session has timeout while user using Confluence, the moment when user click the search bar will redirect user to login page. After user login to Confluence, it will redirect user to the site home page instead of the search page.    Step to reproduce the behavior  # Login to Confluence  # On any confluence page, click the Profile -> log out in a new tab (so the current tab stays as it is).  # On the page then attempt a search by either clicking in the search box or pressing '/' on the keyboard.  # The page will redirect user to login.action  # After successful login, the user will be redirected to home page and not redirected to the search results page.  Example   [^Recording #18.mp4]     h3. Suggestion  Customer would like to allow the user to continue enter the search text that user want to search in the search bar when the user session already timeout. The redirection to login page will only trigger after user entered the search text and press enter. Once the user login to Confluence, it will show the search result user trying to search."""

summary: "Page export to PDF fails if temp folder is a symlink "
description: """h3. Issue Summary    If the {{<Confluence_Home>/temp}} folder is a symlink to somewhere else PDF exports lead to a Page Not Found error    h3. Steps to Reproduce   # Install Confluence   # symlink {{/temp}} from inside the home folder to somewhere else like follows,     # Export a page as PDF    h3. Expected Results    The page should be exported and downloaded by the browser    h3. Actual Results    Confluence shows a Page Not Found error   !image-2020-08-21-14-33-28-734.png|thumbnail!     h3. *Diagnosis*    Capturing a HAR file will show that PDF export action is redirecting to a URL      Though, this redirected URL is not accessible.      h3. Workaround    The PDF export is still available in the {{<Confluence_Home>/temp}} folder and can be fetched manually. Or, symlink should be removed """

summary: "Cannot Edit excel files when Page Name in macro is different from the current page title using Companion App"
description: """h3. Problem  The Edit button for attachments is not visible when using the [Excel macro|https://confluence.<USER>doc/office-excel-macro-375849173.html] on pages that link to the original page where the excel attachment is present     h3. Environment  Confluence 7.5, 7.6    h3. Steps to Reproduce  # Add an excel file to a page (eg. Excel test)  # Add excel macro and select the excel file  # Save and Publish the page  # Confirm that the Edit button can be seen for this attachment (screenshot: excelTest.png)  # Create a new page (eg. Include Excel test)  # Add the excel macro. Edit and under _Page Name_, type """"Excel test""""  # Check that the excel file is selected under the _File Name_  # Save and publish this page  # Notice that the Edit button for this attachment is missing (screenshot: includeExcelTest.png)    h3. Expected Results  Edit button should be visible for attachments in all pages where the office excel macro is used    h3. Actual Results  Only the original page where the attachment is present displays the Edit button. Other excel macros referencing this original page do not show the Edit button    h3. Workaround  This behavior is not replicable when using the [Office Connector|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/enable-edit-in-office-as-a-dark-feature-in-confluence-978217013.html]  If you'd like to enable this, please review [Office Connector Limitations|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/office-connector-limitations-and-known-issues-170492994.html] prior to turning it on for your users.       h3. Notes  The issue can be reproduced only from Confluence version 7.5.X and above. """
comments: "Closing as duplicate of https://jira.<USER>browse/CONFSERVER-59987"

summary: "Jira Issue Date event won't show date/time range if the range is 24h"
description: """h3. Issue Summary  When a Jira Issue Date event is created on Team Calendars using 2 custom fields for Date Time Picker, if the event is *exactly* 24h, the event does not display the 24h range, instead, it displays only on the start date. If using TC 6.0.47 it shows only on the end date.   !image-2020-08-20-13-55-18-469.png|thumbnail!   h3. Steps to Reproduce  # Setup an applink between Confluence and Jira;  # Create two custom Date Time Picker fields on Jira;  # Set up the first field to 6/30/2020 6:30 PM and the second one to 7/1/2020 6:30 PM;  # On Team Calendars, create an event with the Jira Issue Dates type;  # Select these fields for the start and end date.    h3. Expected Results  The event range appears from 6/30/2020 6:30 PM to 7/1/2020 6:30 PM.    h3. Actual Results  The event range appears only on one of the days. The event start and end date/time changes to show only a day and the checkbox """"All day event"""" is checked.    h3. Workaround  Change one of the fields so the date will be 24h01min.  For example, instead of   {panel}starting date/time = *6/30/2020 6:30PM* and final date/time = *7/1/2020 6:30PM*{panel}   use  {panel}starting date/time = *6/30/2020 6:30PM* and final date/time = *7/1/2020 6:31PM*  {panel}"""

summary: "Disable anonymous access to <baseURL>/activity if the homepage is set to a page instead of system dashboard"
description: """Currently, whether you use the default system dashboard or set a custom page as the homepage. When publically available anyone can enter {{/activity}} to the BaseURL and receive an XML of seemingly activity updates with emails, usernames and names included.    Some users like to hide this information and provide a page to customers instead of a dashboard. If that information is not required for standard page could that be removed.    * Custom HTML does not work on that page so you can't redirect anonymous users with AJS.params.remoteUser    (i) Potential workaround - all responses from an authenticated user will have a *X-USERNAME* header. If that is not present, they are anonymous. You could configure your proxy to redirect any requests without that header to your homepage. Please bear in mind this is beyond the scope of technical support."""

summary: "Support Java Security Manager"
description: """Currently, Confluence does seem to officially support JSM (Java security manager).    Per [Apache 9 documentation.|https://tomcat.apache.org/tomcat-9.0-doc/security-manager-howto.html]  {quote}  The Java SecurityManager is what allows a web browser to run an applet in its own sandbox to prevent untrusted code from accessing files on the local file system, connecting to a host other than the one the applet was loaded from, and so on. In the same way the SecurityManager protects you from an untrusted applet running in your browser, use of a SecurityManager while running Tomcat can protect your server from trojan servlets, JSPs, JSP beans, and tag libraries. Or even inadvertent mistakes.  {quote}    JIRA also does not support per this [link.|https://jira.<USER>browse/JRASERVER-63918]    Please consider supporting JSM in Confluence.  """

summary: "Incorrect cached data causing Confluence Workbox not displaying updates from Jira"
description: """h3. Issue Summary  Updates from Jira instance, e.g. comments, mentions and shares don't show Workbox notifications in Confluence.    h3. Environment  Both Confluence & JIRA instance have been integrated to one another via Application Link and [Workbox Notifications have been configured to include Jira notifications as well|https://confluence.<USER>doc/configuring-workbox-notifications-301663830.html#ConfiguringWorkboxNotifications-IncludingnotificationsfromJira].    h3. Steps to Reproduce  On the Jira instance:  # Leave a comment with an @ mention to a user in a Jira issue  # Open the Workbox with that user in Confluence    h3. Expected Results  New updates are being displayed in the configured Confluence Workbox notifications.    h3. Actual Results  New updates aren't being displayed in the configured Confluence Workbox notifications, with no apparent errors thrown in either atlassian-jira.log or atlassian-confluence.log files.    (i) With the debug logging enabled ({{com.atlassian.mywork}}) in both Confluence and Jira, we could see the below exception is thrown in the atlassian-jira.log file:      h3. Cause:  By default, the _mywork-confluence-host-plugin_ do have preventive mechanism which will force refresh this cache value should the existing value is {{NULL}} as shown in the code snippet below.    However, as what we've observed from the log snippet above - the {{HostIdCache}} is currently being recognised as *not {{NULL}}* since its current value is set to *{{none()}}*. Because of this, the force refresh mechanism then won't be triggered by _mywork-confluence-host-plugin_ automatically. This is a bug in the _mywork-confluence-host-plugin_.    h3. Workaround  Currently there is no known workaround for this behaviour. A workaround will be added here when available"""

summary: "Enable Thai Indexing Language in General Configuration"
description: """{panel:bgColor=#e7f4fa}   *NOTE:* This suggestion is for *Confluence Server*. Using *Confluence Cloud*? [See the corresponding suggestion|http://jira.<USER>browse/CONFCLOUD-13477].   {panel}  {quote}  Thai text don't have space between words. Usually, a dictionary-based algorithm is used to break string into words. For Lucene to be usable for Thai, we need to use an Analyzer that know how to break Thai words is needed.    Lucene now included ThaiAnalyzer (org.apache.lucene.analysis.th.ThaiAnalyzer).    After I read Confluence document, I know that I can switch Lucene Analyzer to others Analyzer such as German, Russian to support indexing on these language on Administration > Site Configuration > Formatting and International Settings Section > Indexing Language field.    But I didn't see Thai as a choice  {quote}"""

summary: "As a Confluence Administrator I should be able to enable a System App (or a module) from the UPM UI if it is currently disabled"
description: """h3. Problem Definition    Sometimes a System App, or a module of a System App, might be disabled while Confluence is running or during startup. This could happen by a bug on Confluence or modified directly from the database.   A Confluence administrator isn't able to enable this App/Module from the Universal Plugin Manager UI, requiring some downtime to restart the application when the problem is identified.    Note that this enhancement is not targeted on being able to disable these Apps/modules, but solely on the ability to *enable* them.  h3. Suggested Solution    When a System App (or module of a system app) is disabled, give the Confluence Administrator the ability to enable it from the UPM UI.  h3. Workarounds  h4. Use UPM REST API  Call UPM REST API to change the status of a given plugin or a single module  * [UPM REST API|https://ecosystem.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/UPM/pages/6094960/UPM+REST+API]    h4. Directly updating the database  Enable the App or the module via data manipulation on the database.  Refer to the following KB articles on how to accomplish it:   * [How to Manually Change a Plugin Back to Default State Through the Database|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/how-to-manually-change-a-plugin-back-to-default-state-through-the-database-592609333.html]   * [How to reset all Confluence plugins back to their default state through the database|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/how-to-reset-all-confluence-plugins-back-to-their-default-state-through-the-database-859509873.html]   * [How Do I find enabled and disabled plugins in the database?|https://developer.<USER>server/confluence/how-do-i-find-enabled-and-disabled-plugins-in-the-database/]"""

summary: "Send notifications for excerpt-include macro to users at mentioned inside excerpt macro"

summary: "Confluence Copy/Move Page is Not listing Destination Space Name for Some Space Names"
description: """h3. Problem    In confluence while trying to copy/move page from one space to another, if the destination space name is a subset of a list of spaces already present, the space name is not listed. Hence, the page cannot be copied or moved to the destination page.    h3. Environment  .  Confluence Version 7.2.0 or above.     h3. Steps to Reproduce    Create 20 spaces with the following names:    *Step 1:*    1. HaCon Orga TPS01  2. HaCon Orga TPS02  .  .  .  20. HaCon Orga TPS20  Also create a space named HaCon Orga TPS.     *Step 2:*    Create a test page in any one of the 20 pages initially created. Assuming the page is created under HaCon Orga TPS20.  Try to move or copy this page to the space HaCon Orga TPS.     h3. Expected Results    The destination space should be listed either through partial search or through full search of the string.     h3. Actual Results    The string is not listed through either partial search nor through full string search. Only the other numbered spaces are listed.     h3. Workaround     A semi partial workaround is when moving page from space to space, there is a browse option at the end. This allows for choosing the space that is not coming up in the search. But this workaround does not work for copying pages to new space, where the browse option is not present.    Rebuilding content index also does not fix the issue.    h3. Notes  """

description: """h3. Problem    When using an *HTML Macro* on a Confluence page, it will break the User Interface. Part of the space tools won't be accessible and the display of the content will change/stretch.  h3. Environment    Reproduce on Confluence version *7.6.2* and version *7.4.3*  h3. Steps to Reproduce    On a *Confluence* version *7.6.2* vanilla instance   * Re-enable the *HTML Macro* plugin that is disabled by default   * Create a new page and add an *HTML Macro* either using some code as per described in *[How to use JavaScript in Confluence|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/how-to-use-javascript-in-confluence-313458839.html]* or just add the content below in the HTML Macro:   ** {{<html><head></head><body>Test HTML Body</body></html>}}    h3. Expected Results    HTML Macro should not break the <USER>Interface  h3. Actual Results    HTML Macro is breaking part of the <USER>Interface  h3. Workaround  Using the [HTML for Confluence plugin|https://marketplace.<USER>apps/252/html-for-confluence?hosting=server&tab=overview] seems to offer a viable workaround for now.    h3. Notes    A video with steps to reproduce is attached to this bug report"""

summary: "Restore Editing Location"
description: """h2. *Current Behaviour*  When continuing a draft (or leaving one), Confluence always brings you to the top of the page.    This is especially frustrating when continuing work on a large page.    h2. *Requested Behaviour*    When editing a page or continuing editing the user should be directed to where their cursor last was on the draft. This should also allow plugin developers to utilize this information (ie pages with large diagram plugins).    Also, when exiting a draft, it would be nice if the user is navigated to the location where editing ended."""

summary: "Add ""Select Multiple Bars"" feature in Roadmap Planner widget"
description: """Roadmap Planner is the only tool on Wiki to visually display project status.    In case when there is some major change in your project you need to move multiple tasks in the project to new dates. Currently, you need to move each bar separately. Would be great if there will be a feature to select multiple bars and move them together.    From UI perspective it could be similar to select feature in AutoCAD or SketchUp.    !image-2020-08-12-11-33-36-458.png!"""

summary: "Test and approve Amazon Corretto OpenJDK for Confluence"
description: """h3. Problem Definition  Though Atlassian officially supports OpenJDK, they are not tested and thus it's not guaranteed that all of them (Amazon, Redhat, Azul, Bellsoft, <USER> - just mentioning the most popular ones here) will be working for Confluence.    h3. Suggested Solution  Amazon Corretto OpenJDK should get Confluence's officially approved OpenJDK.    Amazon's OpenJDK provides long term support at no cost including performance and security patches. Find details here: https://aws.amazon.com/corretto/faqs/"""

summary: "-Dupm.pac.disable=true JVM parameter does not prevent Marketplace connectivity in Confluence"
description: """h3. Problem    Confluence is configured to run with *-Dupm.pac.disable=true* as per the [Recognized System Properties|https://confluence.<USER>doc/recognized-system-properties-190430.html]  {quote}  *upm.pac.disable*  |Universal Plugin Manager 1.5|When this property is set to true, then UPM will not try to access the [The Atlassian Marketplace|https://marketplace.<USER>]. This is useful for application servers that do not have access to the Internet. See the [UPM documentation|https://confluence.<USER>upm/problems-connecting-to-the-atlassian-marketplace-273875718.html].| {quote}    But this setting can be overwritten through the <USER>Interface by access to the UPM Settings and Confluence will connect to the MarketPlace.    h3. Environment  Reproduced in Confluence version *7.4.x* and *7.6.x* and/or using UPM version *4.0.17*    h3. Steps to Reproduce  * Configure the Confluence JVM to run with *-Dupm.pac.disable=true*  ** This will disable the *Connect to the Atlassian Marketplace* checkbox in the UPM Settings  * Tick back the *Connect to the Atlassian Marketplace* checkbox.     h3. Expected Results  Confluence should not be able to call the Marketplace when *-Dupm.pac.disable=true* is set, regardless of UI settings. It should be a hard stop for all calls.    h3. Actual Results  Confluence is able to call the MarketPlace even when *-Dupm.pac.disable=true* is set, by tweaking the UI.    h3. Workaround  Keep the UI UPM setting *Connect to the Atlassian Marketplace* disabled at all time    h3. Notes  Recording attached with how the issue was reproduced locally"""
comments: "This is something that we believe should be looked into - in cases where someone were to turn on the connectivity to Marketplace when it has been disabled at the JVM layer. When this is the case, we've noticed that there is slowdown on the application level, especially with apps that are rendering analytics at the dashboard/frontpage."

summary: "Allow the anonymous user get the tiny URL. "
description: """h3. Issue Summary    With the current setup, a user needs to be logged in to get the tiny URL (ctrl+k or cmd+k). For the anonymous users, this option is not available as the requirement is for the user to be logged in first.    If the tiny link is needed for anonymous users, they need to go to page information. However, most of the customers have disabled 'Page Information' for anonymous users concerning any security issues.     Having the ability to get the tiny link by the shortcuts (ctrl+k or cmd+k) will be very helpful.     """

summary: "Use Jira customfield instead of Target Start and Target End as a standard"
description: """In a plan you are able to switch the start and end date to be based on Jira customfields instead of the standard fields """"Target start"""" and """"Target end"""".    It would be great to be able to configure Jira customfields as a global standard for new plans.    At the moment you have to edit every plan manually to have the plan based on the correct date fields (if you use something else than Target start and end)"""

summary: "Update Confluence space trash to display date item was moved to trash"
description: """As a Confluence administrator we continually struggle with teams not understanding that deleting content just moves it to the space trash. This ends up wasting resources in our system as the trash just grows since no one is actively purging it. It would be helpful to have the field """"date deleted/moved to trash"""" displayed in the space trash so we know how long content has been sitting there. This will give us a little more confidence that when the trash is purged we're not removing anything recently deleted that may need to be recovered."""

summary: "Cannot add custom field as columns in Jira Issue Macro (table view) due to case-sensitivity"
description: """h3. Problem    In a Confluence site version *7.4.x* or *7.6.x* connected to a Jira Software via an application link.    We cannot add 2 Jira *custom fields* as *columns* to display in a *Jira Issue Macro* (table view) due to case-sensitivity.  h3. Environment    Confluence version *7.4.x* or *7.6.x* connected to a Jira Software version *8.4.2* via an application link  h3. Steps to Reproduce   # Create 2 custom fields in Jira and configure them to be displayed on some default screens for the user to fill in. In our example, we called these fields *end date* and *End date* and they were date pickers.   # Create a new Jira Issue / Bug and assign a new value to these fields   # Go to Confluence and create a new Confluence page adding a *Jira Issue Macro*   # Customize the Jira Issue Macro and try to make the new custom fields displayed as a column in a Table view    h3. Expected Results    _The user can pick the 2 custom fields as *columns* to display in a *Jira Issue Macro*_  h3. Actual Results    _After picking the first custom field, the second one becomes unavailable for selection in the *Jira Issue Macro*_  h3. Workaround    _No Workaround at this stage except renaming fields on the Jira side that may not be convenient for the user needs._  h3. Notes    A video is attached with my steps to reproduce in Confluence"""
comments: "A fix for this issue is available to Server and Data Center customers in Confluence 7.7.4  [Upgrade|https://www.<USER>software/confluence/download?utm_source=confluence_bugfix&utm_campaign=confluence_bugfix&utm_medium=email] now or check out the [Release Notes|https://confluence.<USER>doc/confluence-7-7-release-notes-1004960930.html] to see what other issues are resolved."

summary: "There is no option to move a page"
description: """It will be good to add this information on the topic *Notes about permissions*.    If you try to move a page and there is restricted page under this page, the option to move the page will not appear.  h2. Example    Check this page, there is a root page called 'teste coisa' and two other pages on the tree: 'Outra coisa' and 'Another node'.    If the user has the permissions, he can move any of these pages, no problem.    !Screen Shot 2020-07-09 at 17.29.53.png|width=870,height=710!    However, if we put a restriction on the page 'Outra coisa', the user will lose the ability to move the 'teste coisa' page and most important, he will lose the ability and the 'Outra coisa' page is not even visible to the user. So, he will never know why he cannot move a page where he has permissions to move.    !Screen Shot 2020-07-09 at 17.36.01.png|width=1256,height=324!    As you can see in the image above, the Move option is not present... This is a bit confusing to the user, since he has permissions to move the page, but there is a hidden page preventing."""

summary: "In app visibility for Anonymous Access space permission"
description: """On the KB article [Assign Space Permissions|https://confluence.<USER>doc/assign-space-permissions-139460.html] there is a bullet point in regards to 'Anonymous Access' that reads:  {quote}Anonymous Access - this is where you grant permissions to users who are not logged in (essentially making the space public). *Note: allowing anonymous access in a space will allow all logged in users to see that space, even if your site is not Public.*  {quote}  In regards to the note (_allowing anonymous access in a space will allow all logged in users to see that space, even if your site is not Public_) it would be ideal that this point is visible on the space permissions page inside Confluence.    Alternatively, adding an information bubble or a popup near the 'Anonymous Access' permission once it's been ticked (but not 'saved') that mentions that the space will be visible to 'all' logged in users once the permission is set would also be viable.    The goal here is to increase visibility for admins that may not know the possible outcome of updating that specific permission and accidentally reveal a space that was restricted."""

summary: "Running Confluence with Oracle Database Native Network Encryption Degrades Performance or Causes Outages"
description: """h3. Issue Summary  Oracle provides a feature called Native Network Encryption: [ORACLE\-BASE \- Native Network Encryption for Database Connections|https://oracle-base.com/articles/misc/native-network-encryption-for-database-connections] This feature was previously part of the Advanced Security Option license, and provides connection encryption without requiring client side configuration.     When this feature is enabled, it adds 350ms+ to the time required to establish a database connection. This alone will cause noteworthy performance degradation, but when combined with the default database connection pool manager in Confluence, c3p0, it can cause intermittent outages and extreme performance degradation.    Oracle have stated that this latency is working as intended: [Slow Connection Using 12c Client When Network Encryption Is Enabled|https://support.oracle.com/knowledge/Oracle Database Products/2247689_1.html]    h3. Steps to Reproduce  # Install any version of Confluence  # Install Oracle DB 11g or later with Native Network Encryption enabled  # Introduce load to the system  # Monitor Confluence for delayed or timeout responses    h3. Expected Results  Confluence should work as per normal.    h3. Actual Results  There is a prolonged delay in establishing database connections that causes c3p0 to get stuck in a loop of attempting to obtain additional database connections. As obtaining these database connections is slow, this will take longer than normal.    Confluence will remain unresponsive until it reaches the c3p0 maximum pool size for the node.    This issue will not be visible in the logs by default, but the following KB provides additional details on how to diagnose this issue: [Confluence Unresponsive Due to High Database Connection Latency|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/confluence-unresponsive-due-to-high-database-connection-latency-983794798.html]    h3. Workaround    A workaround is detailed on this KB: [Confluence Unresponsive Due to High Database Connection Latency|https://confluence.<USER>confkb/confluence-unresponsive-due-to-high-database-connection-latency-983794798.html]    However, it may be preferably to implement SSL to the database with proper certificate exchange, or disable Native Network Encryption entirely. """

summary: "Implement AIP support on Confluence"
description: """Azure Information Protection (AIP) issue with Doc and PPT files is a form of encryption used in document based on their labels. As described by their documentation, this is what happens:  {quote}When you apply a sensitivity label, the label information will persist with your document or email, even as it is shared between devices, applications, and cloud services. Applying a sensitivity label may also result in changes to your document or email according to your organization's configuration, such as:  {quote}  {quote}Encryption with Information Rights Management may be applied to your document or email. A header or footer may appear in your document or email. A watermark may appear in your document  {quote}  All the details can be found here:   * [Apply sensitivity labels to your files and email in Office|https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/apply-sensitivity-labels-to-your-files-and-email-in-office-2f96e7cd-d5a4-403b-8bd7-4cc636bae0f9?ui=en-us&rs=en-us&ad=us#ID0EAEAAA=Office_365]    This is not implement yet on Confluence and raises some errors on the backend:    Since this issue is related to Aspose, checking their forums, they are working on this right now, but it's not fully implemented:   * [Azure Information Protection """"aspose""""|https://www.google.com/search?q=Azure+Information+Protection+%22aspose%22+site:forum.aspose.com&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiCkYbLl4XrAhXXIrkGHU9YB10QrQIoBHoECAoQBQ&biw=2560&bih=1005]    It will be great if Confluence supports it once it's possible."""

summary: "Show number of pages that will be copied when copying page with children"
description: """When you copy a page and select """"Include child pages"""", the next dialog box displays the whole page tree to be copied, but only the top level of children are visible without expanding, so it's not easy to tell how many pages in total are going to be copied. One of our users unintentionally copied a tree of 3000 pages, and then had to delete them all. It would also be great if there was a warning requiring confirmation when the user asks to copy a page tree with more than <n> pages."""
